channel.title: Behold Israel — Telegram Audio
channel.description: Text posts from Amir Tsarfati's Behold Israel Telegram channel, read aloud as a daily audio episode. Unofficial, personal-use feed.
channel.itunes:author: Amir Tsarfati (Behold Israel)
channel.itunes:summary: Text posts from Amir Tsarfati's Behold Israel Telegram channel, read aloud as a daily audio episode.

item.title: Behold Israel — Sunday, April 5, 2026
